name: Village Stage 02
description: Continue village development — upgrade military, economy, and civic buildings after Stage 01.

stages.name: Stage 1 - Town Hall to 10 (Slot 30)
stages.notes: Upgrade Town Hall to level 10 to unlock larger celebrations and prestige bonuses.

stages.name: Stage 2 - Academy to 15 (Slot 32)
stages.notes: Upgrade Academy to level 15 to unlock advanced troop researches.

stages.name: Stage 3 - Barracks to 10 (Slot 37)
stages.notes: Upgrade Barracks to level 10 for faster infantry training.

stages.name: Stage 4 - Stable to 10 (Slot 38)
stages.notes: Upgrade Stable to level 10 for faster cavalry training.

stages.name: Stage 5 - Rally Point to 10 (Slot 39)
stages.notes: Upgrade Rally Point to level 10 for more simultaneous attacks/sends.

stages.name: Stage 6 - Marketplace to 20 (Slot 33)
stages.notes: Upgrade Marketplace to level 20 for maximum trade capacity.
